name: Sweet Coconut Curry Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together water, bread flour, nonfat dried milk, brown sugar, and salt until well combined.
3. Add applesauce, raisins, coconut flakes, curry powder, and yeast to the dough. Mix until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking dish.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and crusty on top.
6. Remove from oven and let cool completely before slicing.
